title: Create Event API
description: API / WebAPI - powershell script/query

title: Alert Ack
description: Acknowledge and append notes to alerts via SWIS API
code:
## Acknowledge an alert with a note

$alertObjectId = 115230
$xmlconfig = @"
    <ArrayOfint xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays">
        <int>$alertObjectId</int>
    </ArrayOfint>
"@
$note = "Here is my note at " + [string](Get-Date)
$config = ([xml]$xmlconfig).DocumentElement
Invoke-SwisVerb -SwisConnection $swis -EntityName 'Orion.AlertActive' -Verb 'Acknowledge' -Arguments @($config,$note)

## Append an alert with a note

$alertObjectId = 115230
$xmlconfig = @"
    <ArrayOfint xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays">
        <int>$alertObjectId</int>
    </ArrayOfint>
"@
$note = "Here is my appended note at " + [string](Get-Date)
$config = ([xml]$xmlconfig).DocumentElement
Invoke-SwisVerb -SwisConnection $swis -EntityName 'Orion.AlertActive' -Verb 'AppendNote' -Arguments @($config,$note)

title: Alert Check - BES Client Monitor%
description: SWQL alert condition query for: IEM_P_A_E: BES Client Monitor%
code:
-- Alert: IEM_P_A_E: BES Client Monitor%
SELECT E0.[Uri], E0.[DisplayName] FROM Orion.APM.Component AS E0
WHERE ( ( ( ( E0.[Application].[ApplicationAlert].[ApplicationName] = 'BES Client Monitor - Linux' ) OR
( E0.[Application].[ApplicationAlert].[ApplicationName] = 'BES Client Monitor - Linux (Non-Prod)' ) OR
( E0.[Application].[ApplicationAlert].[ApplicationName] = 'BES Client Monitor - Solaris' ) ) AND
( E0.[Application].[CustomProperties].[Application_Code] = 'IEM' ) AND ( E0.[Application].[CustomProperties].[Application_Name] = 'IBM Endpoint Manager' ) AND
( E0.[Application].[CustomProperties].[MonitorType] = 'Custom_Monitor' ) AND ( E0.[Application].[CustomProperties].[Alerting] = 'True' ) ) AND
( E0.[Application].[Node].[Caption] like '$caption' ) )

$creds = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential($username,$pwd)
$swor = "YOUR_SERVER_HOSTNAME"

if(Test-Path $LogfilePath){Remove-Item $LogfilePath}

#region Connect

# Test connection

if($test_swor -eq $null)
{
    Add-Content $LogfilePath "Test query returned ZERO. Check the connection or the hostname you entered and run again!"
    return "Test query returned ZERO. Check the connection or the hostname you entered and run again!"
}
else
{
    Add-Content $LogfilePath "Message=`"Connection tested okay.`""
    if($test_swor.length -gt 1)
    {
        Add-Content $LogfilePath "Message=`"Orion returned more than one node.`""
        return "Orion returned more than one node. Check your Caption and try again."
    }
    Add-Content $LogfilePath "---------------------------------"
    Add-Content $LogfilePath ""
}
#endregion Connect

{
    $objtype = $snmp_ver
}

title: AdminMig - ICMP & SNMP Migration
description: Automation - powershell script/query
code:
##--------------ICMP & SNMP Migration----------------------------------------##
foreach ($sourceNode in $SNMPType) {
    # See if there is already a node on the target with the same IP address
    $targetNodeUri = Get-SwisData $target "SELECT Uri FROM Orion.Nodes WHERE IPAddress=@ip" @{ip=$sourceNode.IPAddress}

    if ($targetNodeUri -ne $null) {
        Add-Content $LogfilePath "Skipping" $sourceNode.Caption "(" $sourceNode.IPAddress ") because it is already managed by " $hostname2
        continue
    }

    # Fetch all properties of the source node
    $sourceNodeProps = Get-SwisData $source "SELECT  Caption, Uri,Community, Contact, DNS, DynamicIP, External, EntityType, GroupStatus, IOSImage, IOSVersion, IPAddress, IPAddressGUID,
        IPAddressType, LastSystemUpTimePollUtc, Location, MachineType, NodeDescription, ObjectSubType, PollInterval, RediscoveryInterval, Severity, SNMPVersion,
        StatCollection, Status, StatusDescription, StatusLED, SysName, SysObjectID, TotalMemory, Vendor, VendorIcon, RWCommunity,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.Username AS SNMPV3Username, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.Context AS SNMPV3Context,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.PrivacyMethod AS SNMPV3PrivMethod, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.PrivacyKey AS SNMPV3PrivKey,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.PrivacyKeyIsPassword AS SNMPV3PrivKeyIsPwd, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.AuthenticationMethod AS SNMPV3AuthMethod,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.AuthenticationKey AS SNMPV3AuthKey, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.AuthenticationKeyIsPassword AS SNMPV3AuthKeyIsPwd,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWUsername AS RWSNMPV3Username, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWContext AS RWSNMPV3Context,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWPrivacyMethod AS RWSNMPV3PrivMethod, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWPrivacyKey AS RWSNMPV3PrivKey,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWPrivacyKeyIsPassword AS RWSNMPV3PrivKeyIsPwd, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWAuthenticationMethod AS RWSNMPV3AuthMethod,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWAuthenticationKey AS RWSNMPV3AuthKey, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWAuthenticationKeyIsPassword AS RWSNMPV3AuthKeyIsPwd
        From Orion.Nodes Where NodeID = @nodeid" @{nodeid=$sourceNode.Nodeid}

##--------------------------------InternalDebuglog----------------------------------------------##
$DatevalueToAppendLogName = (get-Date).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss")
$LogFileName = "Migration_Orion_Nodes"+$DatevalueToAppendLogName
$LogfilePath = "C:\YOUR_SCRIPTS_PATH\LogFolder\$LogFileName.log"
New-Item $LogfilePath -type file
Add-Content $LogfilePath "--------------------------$LogFileName ----------------------------"
#--------------------------------Credentials----------------------------------------------------##
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$CopyVolumes = $true
$CopyInterfaces = $true
$hostname1 = "XXX";
$username1 = "XXX"
$hostname2 = "XXX";
$password2 = "XXX"
$username2 = "XXX"
Import-Module SwisPowerShell
#--------------------------- Connect to the source system----------------------------------------###
$source = Connect-Swis -Hostname $hostname1 -Username $username1 -Password $password1
# ---------------------------------Connect to the target system----------------------------------##
$target = Connect-Swis -Hostname $hostname2 -Username $username2 -Password $password2

# Get the complete list of Nodes from the source system
$sourceNodes = Get-SwisData $source "SELECT d.Uri, d.IPAddress, d.ObjectSubType,d.Caption, d.NodeID FROM Orion.Nodes as d where [d].CustomProperties.Environment not in ('DR','Pre-Prod','Production')"
#---------Node going to migrate ------------------##
$WMIType=$sourceNodes | where {$_.ObjectSubType -eq 'WMI'}
$SNMPType=$sourceNodes | where {$_.ObjectSubType -eq 'SNMP'}
Add-Content $LogfilePath "$sourceNodes"

title: Base template
description: Automation - powershell script/query
code:
Base template:
#powershell -command "&C:\YOUR_SCRIPTS_PATH\ScriptFiles\Template.ps1 -strNodeName '${N=SwisEntity;M=Caption}' -strNodeIPAddress '${N=SwisEntity;M=IP_Address}' -strNodeType  '${N=SwisEntity;M=MachineType}' -strDateTime  '${N=Generic;M=DateTime;F=DateTime}'  -strAlertName  '${N=Alerting;M=AlertName}' -strSeverity ' ' -strType '${N=SwisEntity;M=MachineType}' -strAlertID '${N=Alerting;M=AlertID}'"

Param(

  [String]$strNodeName,
  [String]$strNodeIPAddress,
  [String]$strNodeType,
  [String]$strtriggerTime,
  [String]$strAlertName,
  [String]$strSeverity,
  [String]$stralertID,
  [String]$strcomponentStatus,
  [String]$stralertType,
  [String]$strapplicationName,
  [String]$strappCode,
  [String]$strcomponent,
  [String]$strmessage,
  [String]$strLocationID

)

#-------Dynamic Log File ------------------------#
$DatevalueToAppendLogName = (get-Date).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss")
$LogFileName = "WebAPI_"+$strNodeName +"_"+$NodeIPAddress+"_"+$DatevalueToAppendLogName
$LogfilePath = "C:\YOUR_SCRIPTS_PATH\LogFolder\$LogFileName.txt"
New-Item $LogfilePath -type file
#------------------------------------------------#

Add-Content $LogfilePath "--------------------------------------------- Start of alert forwarding process ---------------------------------------------------"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "============================================= Data recieved at subscription ======================================================="
$intNumOfArguments = $PSBoundParameters.Count
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Number Of Arguements recieved from SOlarWinds  : $intNumOfArguments"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert NodeName : $strNodeName"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert NodeIPAddress : $strNodeIPAddress"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert NodeType : $strNodeType"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert triggerTime : $strtriggerTime"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert AlertName : $strAlertName"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert Severity : $strSeverity"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert AssignmentGroup : $strAssignmentGroup"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert LocationID : $strLocationID"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert AlerID : $stralertID,"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert ComponentStatus : $strcomponentStatus"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert AlertType : $stralertType"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert ApplicationName : $strapplicationName"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert AppCode : $strappCode"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert Component : $strcomponent"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert Message : $srtmessage"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert Type : $strType"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "===================================================================================================================================="

#--------------------------------------------
#Message Key of ticket
#--------------------------------------------
$MessagekeyString = $strNodeName+":"+$strAlertName
#--------------------------------------------

Add-Content $LogfilePath "============================================= Criticality deciding process============================================================"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert criticality identified : $strSeverity"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "======================================================================================================================================"


Add-Content $LogfilePath "============================================================== Message key ==========================================================="
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Message Key of Alert : $MessagekeyString"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "======================================================================================================================================"

#--------- Credentials --------------------------------#
$Header_bsr = @{
 "Authentication"="YOUR_API_KEY"
 "Content-Type"="application/json"
}
#-------------------------------------------------------#
#---------- Empty value hardcoded ----------------------#
if(!$strapplicationName)
{
	$strapplicationName = "No Application name present."
}

if(!$stralertID)
{
	$stralertID = "Testing Alert."
}
if(!$trigger_time)
{
	$trigger_time = Get-Date -Format "MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss"
}

#----------JSON Object ---------------------------------#
Add-Content $LogfilePath "====================================================== Jason Object =================================================================="
   $temp1 = New-Object System.Object
   #$temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "source" -Value "SolarWinds"
   #$temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "state" -Value "Ready"
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "severity" -Value $strSeverity
   #$temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "AssignmentGroup" -Value $strAssignmentGroup
   #$temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "LocationID" -Value $strLocationID
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "triggerTime" -Value $trigger_Time
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "alertName" -Value $stralertName
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "ip" -Value $strNodeIPAddress
   #$temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "description" -Value $strAlertName
   #$temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "message_key" -Value $MessagekeyString
   #$temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "type" -Value $strnodeType
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "hostName" -Value $strNodeName
   #$temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "NodeIPAddress" -Value $strNodeIPAddress
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "alertID" -Value $stralertID
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "componentStatus" -Value $strcomponentStatus
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "alertType" -Value $stralerttype
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "applicationName" -Value $strapplicationName
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "appCode" -Value $strappCode
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "component" -Value $strcomponent
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "message" -Value $strmessage
   #$temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "LocationID" -Value $strLocationID

#---------- Convert Jason ------------------------#
$JasonValue  = $temp1 | ConvertTo-Json
#-------------------------------------------------#
#----------- BSR URL -----------------------------#
$bsr = 'http://YOUR_SERVER_HOSTNAME:9001/api/Anonymous/PostOrionAlert'
#-------------------------------------------------#

Add-Content $LogfilePath "$JasonValue"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "========================================================================================================================================"


Add-Content $LogfilePath "============================================== API call to send an alert to target ==============================================="

#---------- Call API To Target------------------------------#
Try {
$Rt = Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri $bsr -Body $JasonValue -Headers $Header_bsr
}
Catch {
Add-Content $LogfilePath "`n Error message : $_.Exception.Message"
}
#----------------------------------------------------#

#---------- Sent  History log -----------------------#
$EchoID =  $Rt.result.sys_id
if($EchoID){
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Successfully sent and echo ID is : $EchoID"
}
Else{
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert not sent as echo did not recieve from Target"
}
Add-Content $LogfilePath "========================================================================================================================================"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "-------------------------------------------- End of alert forwarding process -----------------------------------------------------------"

#-----------------------------------------------------#

"@

$b=""
$Encoded=""
##----------------------------Orion Nodes------------------------------------##


function Orion_Inventory
{

    $server = 'YOUR_SERVER_HOSTNAME'
    $url = "https://${server}:8089/services/search/jobs/export"
    $splunk_usr = "YOUR_USERNAME"
    $splunk_pwd = ConvertTo-SecureString "YOUR_PASSWORD" -AsPlainText -Force
    $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential($splunk_usr,$splunk_pwd)

    $search = "| inputlookup Network_Inventory.csv"
    $body = @{
    search = $search
    output_mode = "csv"
    earliest_time = "-5m"
    latest_time = "-1m"
        }

add-type @"
    using System.Net;
    using System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates;
    public class TrustAllCertsPolicy : ICertificatePolicy {
        public bool CheckValidationResult(
            ServicePoint srvPoint, X509Certificate certificate,
            WebRequest request, int certificateProblem) {
            return true;
        }
    }
"@
[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::CertificatePolicy = New-Object TrustAllCertsPolicy

    # This will allow for self-signed SSL certs to work
    [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12
    [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = { $true }
    $SearchResults = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri $url -Credential $cred -Body $body -TimeoutSec 300 | ConvertFrom-Csv
    return $SearchResults
}

$IP=$All.Ip_Address

description: SolarWinds heartbeat/polling status check script

function LogWrite
{
   Param ([string]$logstring)
   $logstring | Out-File $tmp_LogfilePath -Append
}

function clean_up_logfile
{
    Move-Item -Path $tmp_LogfilePath -Destination $LogfilePath

#------------------------------------------------#
#--------- Credentials --------------------------------#
$headers = New-Object "System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary[[String],[String]]"
$headers.Add("Authorization", "Splunk 982927c5-f01e-4c35-85e2-b21ca227c2c5")
$headers.Add("Content-Type", "text/plain")
#-------------------Date and Time------------------------------------#
#----------- SPlunk URL -----------------------------#
$SPK = 'https://splunkhf2.YOUR_COMPANY.com:8088/services/collector/raw'
#-------------------------------------------------#
$J='"severity": Critical,
"AlertName": Solarwinds_HeartBeat_Alert,
"HostName" : YOUR_SERVER_HOSTNAME,
"AppCode" : SWOR'
#---------- Call API To Target------------------------------#
add-type @"
    using System.Net;
    using System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates;
    public class TrustAllCertsPolicy : ICertificatePolicy {
        public bool CheckValidationResult(
            ServicePoint srvPoint, X509Certificate certificate,
            WebRequest request, int certificateProblem) {
            return true;
        }
    }
"@
[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::CertificatePolicy = New-Object TrustAllCertsPolicy

    # This will allow for self-signed SSL certs to work
    [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12
    [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = { $true }
$Rt = Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri $SPK  -Headers $headers -Body $J
#----------------------------------------------------#

#---------- Sent  History log -----------------------#
$EchoID =  $Rt.result.sys_id
if($EchoID){
LogWrite "Successfully sent and echo ID is : $EchoID"
}
Else{
LogWrite "Alert not sent as echo did not recieve from Target"
}

clean_up_logfile

#--------------------------------------------

Add-Content $LogfilePath "============================================= Criticality deciding process============================================================"

 "Authentication"="XXX"
 "Content-Type"="application/json"
}

{

}

{

}

   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "severity" -Value $strSeverity

   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "alertID" -Value $stralertID
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "componentStatus" -Value $strcomponentStatus
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "alertType" -Value $stralerttype
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "applicationName" -Value $strapplicationName
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "appCode" -Value $strappCode
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "component" -Value $strcomponent
   $temp1 | Add-Member -MemberType NoteProperty -Name "message" -Value $strmessage

#---------- Convert Jason ------------------------#
$JasonValue  = $temp1 | ConvertTo-Json
#-------------------------------------------------#
#----------- BSR URL -----------------------------#
$bsr = 'http://XXX/api/Anonymous/PostOrionAlert'
#-------------------------------------------------#

Add-Content $LogfilePath "$JasonValue"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "========================================================================================================================================"


Add-Content $LogfilePath "============================================== API call to send an alert to target ==============================================="

#---------- Call API To Target------------------------------#
Try {
$Rt = Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri $bsr -Body $JasonValue -Headers $Header_bsr
}
Catch {
Add-Content $LogfilePath "`n Error message : $_.Exception.Message"
}
#----------------------------------------------------#

#---------- Sent  History log -----------------------#
$EchoID =  $Rt.result.sys_id
if($EchoID){
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Successfully sent and echo ID is : $EchoID"
}
Else{
Add-Content $LogfilePath "Alert not sent as echo did not recieve from Target"
}
Add-Content $LogfilePath "========================================================================================================================================"
Add-Content $LogfilePath "-------------------------------------------- End of alert forwarding process -----------------------------------------------------------"

$key = New-Object Byte[] 32
[Security.Cryptography.RNGCryptoServiceProvider]::Create().GetBytes($key)
$key | Set-Content "C:\YOUR_PATH\Secure\aes.key"

# Prompt for CUCM password
$pwd = Read-Host "Enter CUCM password" -AsSecureString
$pwd | ConvertFrom-SecureString -Key $key |
    Set-Content "C:\YOUR_PATH\Secure\cucm.cred"

# Prompt for SolarWinds password
$pwd2 = Read-Host "Enter SolarWinds password" -AsSecureString
$pwd2 | ConvertFrom-SecureString -Key $key |
    Set-Content "C:\YOUR_PATH\Secure\solarwinds.cred"

$DatevalueToAppendLogName = (get-Date).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss")

#--------------------------------Credentials----------------------------------------------------##
$hostname = "XXX";
$username = "YOUR_USERNAME"
$Password = YOUR_PASSWORD
Import-Module SwisPowerShell
#--------------------------- Connect to the source system----------------------------------------###
$swis = Connect-Swis -Hostname $hostname -Username $username -Password $password

#Getting the WMI service account Credential ID
$WMI_Id = Get-SwisData $swis "SELECT ID FROM Orion.Credential where Name = 'WMI'"
$SNMPV3_Id= Get-SwisData $swis "SELECT ID FROM Orion.Credential Where Name='Unix SNMPv3'"

#---------------------------Log--------------------------------------------------------------------##
function LogWrite
{
   Param ([string]$logstring)
   $logstring | Out-File $tmp_LogfilePath -Append
}

function clean_up_logfile
{
    Move-Item -Path $tmp_LogfilePath -Destination $LogfilePath
}

##------------------------API call to Splunk to get Server list details---------------------------------------##
function get-splunk-search-results
{

    $server = 'YOUR_SERVER_HOSTNAME'
    $url = "https://${server}:8089/services/search/jobs/export"
    $splunk_usr = "YOUR_USERNAME"
    $splunk_pwd = ConvertTo-SecureString "YOUR_PASSWORD" -AsPlainText -Force
    $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential($splunk_usr,$splunk_pwd)

title: AXL VS RIS Phone
description: Cisco CUCM - sql script/query
code:
AXL VS RIS Phone:
# ======================== CUCM PHONE REGISTRATION PERCENTAGE =============================#

# ---- LOAD CREDENTIALS ----
$SecurePath = "C:\YOUR_PATH\Secure"
$key = Get-Content "$SecurePath\aes.key"
$cucmPass = Get-Content "$SecurePath\cucm.cred" | ConvertTo-SecureString -Key $key
$Cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential ("SVCRTMT", $cucmPass)

# ---- CLUSTERS ----
$CucmClusters = @(
    @{ Name="APAC"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS"; Version="15.0" },
    @{ Name="EMEA"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS"; Version="15.0" },
    @{ Name="AMER"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS";  Version="15.0" }
)

# ---- SSL BYPASS ----
[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = {$true}
[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [System.Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12

try {

    foreach ($cluster in $CucmClusters) {

        # ---------------- AXL: TOTAL CONFIGURED PHONES ----------------
        $axlSoap = @"
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"
xmlns:ns="http://www.cisco.com/AXL/API/$($cluster.Version)">
<soapenv:Header/>
<soapenv:Body>
<ns:executeSQLQuery>
<sql>
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalPhones
FROM device d
JOIN typemodel tm ON d.tkmodel = tm.enum
JOIN typeclass tc ON tm.tkclass = tc.enum
WHERE tc.name = 'Phone'
</sql>
</ns:executeSQLQuery>
</soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>
"@

        $axlHeaders = @{
            "SOAPAction" = "CUCM:DB ver=$($cluster.Version) executeSQLQuery"
        }

        $axlResp = Invoke-RestMethod `
            -Uri "https://$($cluster.Server):8443/axl/" `
            -Method Post `
            -Credential $Cred `
            -ContentType "text/xml; charset=utf-8" `
            -Headers $axlHeaders `
            -Body $axlSoap `
            -TimeoutSec 60

        $configured = [int]$axlResp.Envelope.Body.executeSQLQueryResponse.return.row.TotalPhones

        if (-not $configured) { $configured = 0 }

        # ---------------- RIS: REGISTERED PHONES ----------------
        $risSoap = @"
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.cisco.com/ast/soap">
<soapenv:Header/>
<soapenv:Body>
<soap:selectCmDevice>
<soap:StateInfo></soap:StateInfo>
<soap:CmSelectionCriteria>
<soap:MaxReturnedDevices>10000</soap:MaxReturnedDevices>
<soap:DeviceClass>Phone</soap:DeviceClass>
<soap:Model>255</soap:Model>
<soap:Status>Registered</soap:Status>
<soap:NodeName></soap:NodeName>
<soap:SelectBy>Name</soap:SelectBy>
<soap:SelectItems>
<soap:item>
<soap:Item></soap:Item>
</soap:item>
</soap:SelectItems>
<soap:Protocol>Any</soap:Protocol>
<soap:DownloadStatus>Any</soap:DownloadStatus>
</soap:CmSelectionCriteria>
</soap:selectCmDevice>
</soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>
"@

        $risHeaders = @{
            "SOAPAction" = '"selectCmDevice"'
        }

        $risResp = Invoke-RestMethod `
            -Uri "https://$($cluster.Server):8443/realtimeservice2/services/RISService70" `
            -Method Post `
            -Credential $Cred `
            -ContentType "text/xml; charset=utf-8" `
            -Headers $risHeaders `
            -Body $risSoap `
            -TimeoutSec 60

        $registered = 0

        $result = $risResp.Envelope.Body.selectCmDeviceResponse.selectCmDeviceReturn.SelectCmDeviceResult

        if ($result -and $result.CmNodes -and $result.CmNodes.item) {

            foreach ($node in @($result.CmNodes.item)) {
                if ($node.CmDevices -and $node.CmDevices.item) {
                    $registered += @($node.CmDevices.item).Count
                }
            }
        }

        if (-not $registered) { $registered = 0 }

        # ---------------- CALCULATE PERCENTAGE ----------------
        if ($configured -gt 0) {
            $percent = [math]::Round(($registered / $configured) * 100, 2)
        }
        else {
            $percent = 0
        }

        # ---------------- OUTPUT ----------------
        Write-Host "Statistic.$($cluster.Name)_PHONE_TOTAL: $configured"
        Write-Host "Statistic.$($cluster.Name)_PHONE_REG: $registered"
        Write-Host "Statistic.$($cluster.Name)_PHONE_PERCENT: $percent"
        Write-Host "Message.$($cluster.Name)_PHONE_PERCENT: $percent% phones registered in $($cluster.Name)"
    }

    exit 0
}
catch {
    Write-Host "Statistic.Error: 0"
    Write-Host "Message.Error: Registration percentage check failed"
    exit 0
}

title: CUCM Int  -  (Part 1/2)
description: Cisco CUCM integration via AXL/RIS APIs for phone monitoring (Part 1 of 2)
code:
####################################################

# ================= CREDENTIAL ==============================
$Cred      = Get-StoredCredential -Target "CUCM_AXL"
$SolarCred = Get-StoredCredential -Target "SOLARWINDS_API"

# ================= CUCM CLUSTERS ===========================

$CucmClusters = @(
    @{ Name="APAC"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS"; Version="15.0" },
    @{ Name="EMEA"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS"; Version="15.0" },
    @{ Name="AMER"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS";  Version="15.0" }
)

# ================= SSL =====================================
add-type @"
using System.Net;
using System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates;

public class TrustAllCertsPolicy : ICertificatePolicy {
    public bool CheckValidationResult(
        ServicePoint srvPoint,
        X509Certificate certificate,
        WebRequest request,
        int certificateProblem) {
        return true;
    }
}
"@

[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::CertificatePolicy = New-Object TrustAllCertsPolicy
[Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12


# =========================================================
# PART 1 — COLLECT CUCM TRUNKS
# =========================================================

$CUCMRows = @()

foreach ($cluster in $CucmClusters) {

    Write-Host "`n[CUCM] Querying $($cluster.Name) $($cluster.Server)..."

    $axlSoap = @"
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"
xmlns:ns="http://www.cisco.com/AXL/API/$($cluster.Version)">
<soapenv:Body>
<ns:executeSQLQuery>
<sql>
SELECT
 d.name,
 tm.name AS model,
 tc.name AS class,
 d.description,
 dp.name AS devicepool,
 l.name AS location
FROM device d
JOIN typemodel tm ON d.tkmodel = tm.enum
JOIN typeclass tc ON tm.tkclass = tc.enum
LEFT JOIN devicepool dp ON d.fkdevicepool = dp.pkid
LEFT JOIN location l ON d.fklocation = l.pkid
WHERE tc.name IN ('Trunk')
</sql>
</ns:executeSQLQuery>
</soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>
"@

    try {

        $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://$($cluster.Server):8443/axl/" -Method Post -Credential $Cred -ContentType "text/xml" -Body $axlSoap -TimeoutSec 60

        $rows = $resp.Envelope.Body.executeSQLQueryResponse.return.row

        foreach ($r in $rows) {

            $ip = $null
            if ($r.description -match '(\d{1,3}(\.\d{1,3}){3})') {
                $ip = $Matches[1]
            }

            $CUCMRows += [pscustomobject]@{
                Cluster     = $cluster.Name
                DeviceName  = $r.name
                Model       = $r.model
                Class       = $r.class
                Description = $r.description
                DevicePool  = $r.devicepool
                Location    = $r.location
                GatewayIP   = $ip
            }
        }

        Write-Host "✔ $($rows.Count) trunks from $($cluster.Name)"

    }
    catch {
        Write-Host "❌ CUCM $($cluster.Name) failed: $($_.Exception.Message)" -ForegroundColor Red
    }
}

$CUCMRows | Export-Csv $CUCMFile -NoTypeInformation

# =========================================================
# PART 2 — SOLARWINDS VOICE GATEWAYS
# =========================================================

Write-Host "`n[SolarWinds] Querying Orion..."

$swis = Connect-Swis -Hostname $OrionServer -Credential $SolarCred

$query = @"
SELECT N.Caption, N.IP_Address, N.MachineType, N.Status
FROM Orion.Nodes N
WHERE N.CustomProperties.Device_Type='Voice Gateway' OR N.CustomProperties.Department='Voice'
"@

$SolarRows = Get-SwisData -SwisConnection $swis -Query $query

# =========================================================
# PART 3 — COMPARE IPs
# =========================================================

$CUCMIPs  = $CUCMRows | Where-Object GatewayIP | Select-Object -Expand GatewayIP -Unique
$SolarIPs = $SolarRows | Where-Object IP_Address | Select-Object -Expand IP_Address -Unique

$Compare = Compare-Object -ReferenceObject $SolarIPs -DifferenceObject $CUCMIPs -IncludeEqual

$ExtraIPs   = $Compare | Where SideIndicator -eq "<=" | Select -Expand InputObject
$MissingIPs = $Compare | Where SideIndicator -eq "=>" | Select -Expand InputObject
$MatchIPs   = $Compare | Where SideIndicator -eq "==" | Select -Expand InputObject

$ExtraSW = foreach ($ip in $ExtraIPs) {
    $SolarRows | Where IP_Address -eq $ip
}

$MissingSW = foreach ($ip in $MissingIPs) {
    $CUCMRows | Where GatewayIP -eq $ip
}

========================================================= # EXPORT RESULTS # ========================================================= $timestamp = Get-Date -Format "yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss" $RunFolder = "C:\YOUR_PATH\VoiceGW_$timestamp" New-Item $RunFolder -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null $ExtraFile = "$RunFolder\ExtraInSolarWinds.csv" $MissingFile = "$RunFolder\MissingInSolarWinds.csv" $MatchFile = "$RunFolder\Matched.csv" $CUCMFile = "$RunFolder\CUCM_Inv.csv" Write-Host "`n===== COUNTS =====================" Write-Host "ExtraSW : $($ExtraSW.Count)" Write-Host "MissingSW : $($MissingSW.Count)" Write-Host "Matched : $($Matched.Count)" Write-Host "==================================" Write-Host "`n===== Missing Nodes ===============================================" $MissingSW |select Cluster,DeviceName,Location,GateWayIP | Format-Table -AutoSize Write-Host "=====================================================================" $ExtraSW | Export-Csv $ExtraFile -NoTypeInformation $MissingSW | Export-Csv $MissingFile -NoTypeInformation $Matched | Export-Csv $MatchFile -NoTypeInformation $CUCMRows | Export-Csv $CUCMFile -NoTypeInformation <#$HtmlFile = "$RunFolder\MissingInSolarWinds.html" $MissingSW | Select Cluster, DeviceName, GatewayIP, Location, DevicePool | ConvertTo-Html -Title "CUCM Gateways Missing in SolarWinds" ` -PreContent "

CUCM → SolarWinds Gap Report

Run: $timestamp

" | Out-File $HtmlFile -Encoding UTF8#>

title: Phone configured
description: Network Configuration Manager automation and config change tracking
code:
Phone configured:
# ======================== CUCM PHONE CONFIGURED COUNT (FIXED) =============================#

# ---- LOAD CREDENTIALS ----
$SecurePath = "C:\YOUR_PATH\Secure"
$key = Get-Content "$SecurePath\aes.key"
$cucmPass = Get-Content "$SecurePath\cucm.cred" | ConvertTo-SecureString -Key $key
$Cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential ("SVCRTMT", $cucmPass)

# ---- CLUSTERS ----
$CucmClusters = @(
    @{ Name="APAC"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS"; Version="15.0" },
    @{ Name="EMEA"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS"; Version="15.0" },
    @{ Name="AMER"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS";  Version="15.0" }
)

# ---- SSL BYPASS (Safe Version) ----
[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = {$true}
[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [System.Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12

try {

    foreach ($cluster in $CucmClusters) {

        $soapBody = @"
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"
xmlns:ns="http://www.cisco.com/AXL/API/$($cluster.Version)">
<soapenv:Header/>
<soapenv:Body>
<ns:executeSQLQuery>
<sql>
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalPhones
FROM device d
JOIN typemodel tm ON d.tkmodel = tm.enum
JOIN typeclass tc ON tm.tkclass = tc.enum
WHERE tc.name = 'Phone'
</sql>
</ns:executeSQLQuery>
</soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>
"@

        $headers = @{
            "SOAPAction" = "CUCM:DB ver=$($cluster.Version) executeSQLQuery"
        }

        $resp = Invoke-RestMethod `
            -Uri "https://$($cluster.Server):8443/axl/" `
            -Method Post `
            -Credential $Cred `
            -ContentType "text/xml; charset=utf-8" `
            -Headers $headers `
            -Body $soapBody `
            -TimeoutSec 60

        $count = [int]$resp.Envelope.Body.executeSQLQueryResponse.return.row.TotalPhones

        if (-not $count) { $count = 0 }

        $label = "$($cluster.Name)_PHONE_CFG"

        Write-Host "Statistic.$($label): $count"
        Write-Host "Message.$($label): $count phones configured in $($cluster.Name)"
    }

    exit 0
}
catch {
    Write-Host "Statistic.Error: 0"
    Write-Host "Message.Error: Phone count query failed"
    exit 0
}

title: Phone registered (Part 1/2)
description: Cisco CUCM - powershell script/query (Part 1 of 2)
code:
Phone registered:
# ======================== CUCM PHONE REGISTRATION (RIS) - FINAL WORKING VERSION =============================#
# Fixed based on actual WSDL: StateInfo must be an empty string "", not an empty element
# ===========================================================================================================#

# ---- LOAD CREDENTIALS ----
$SecurePath = "C:\YOUR_PATH\Secure"
$key = Get-Content "$SecurePath\aes.key"
$cucmPass = Get-Content "$SecurePath\cucm.cred" | ConvertTo-SecureString -Key $key
$Cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential ("SVCRTMT", $cucmPass)

# ---- CLUSTERS ----
$CucmClusters = @(
    @{ Name="APAC"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS" },
    @{ Name="EMEA"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS" },
    @{ Name="AMER"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS" }
)

# ---- SSL BYPASS ----
if (-not ([System.Management.Automation.PSTypeName]'TrustAllCertsPolicy').Type) {
    Add-Type @"
using System.Net;
using System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates;
public class TrustAllCertsPolicy : ICertificatePolicy {
    public bool CheckValidationResult(
        ServicePoint srvPoint, X509Certificate certificate,
        WebRequest request, int certificateProblem) { return true; }
}
"@
}
[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::CertificatePolicy = New-Object TrustAllCertsPolicy
[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [System.Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12

# ======================== EXECUTION =============================#
try {
    foreach ($cluster in $CucmClusters) {

        # ============================================================
        # THE FIX: Based on WSDL, StateInfo is REQUIRED as xsd:string
        # WSDL shows: <element name="StateInfo" type="xsd:string"/>
        # This means it expects a string value, even if empty
        # We pass an empty string "" instead of removing it or leaving it as <StateInfo/>
        # ============================================================

        $soapBody = @"
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.cisco.com/ast/soap">
<soapenv:Header/>
<soapenv:Body>
<soap:selectCmDevice>
<soap:StateInfo></soap:StateInfo>
<soap:CmSelectionCriteria>
<soap:MaxReturnedDevices>10000</soap:MaxReturnedDevices>
<soap:DeviceClass>Phone</soap:DeviceClass>
<soap:Model>255</soap:Model>
<soap:Status>Any</soap:Status>
<soap:NodeName></soap:NodeName>
<soap:SelectBy>Name</soap:SelectBy>
<soap:SelectItems>
<soap:item>
<soap:Item></soap:Item>
</soap:item>
</soap:SelectItems>
<soap:Protocol>Any</soap:Protocol>
<soap:DownloadStatus>Any</soap:DownloadStatus>
</soap:CmSelectionCriteria>
</soap:selectCmDevice>
</soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>
"@

        $uri = "https://$($cluster.Server):8443/realtimeservice2/services/RISService70"

        # Critical: SOAPAction must match WSDL exactly: just "selectCmDevice"
        # Some SOAP implementations need quotes, try both versions
        $headers = @{
            "SOAPAction" = '"selectCmDevice"'
        }

        $resp = Invoke-RestMethod `
            -Uri $uri `
            -Method Post `
            -Credential $Cred `
            -ContentType "text/xml; charset=utf-8" `
            -Headers $headers `
            -Body $soapBody `
            -TimeoutSec 60

        # Validate response
        $result = $resp.Envelope.Body.selectCmDeviceResponse.selectCmDeviceReturn.SelectCmDeviceResult

        if (-not $result) {
            Write-Host "Statistic.$($cluster.Name)_REG: 0"
            Write-Host "Message.$($cluster.Name)_REG: Empty response from $($cluster.Name)"
            Write-Host "Statistic.$($cluster.Name)_UNREG: 0"
            Write-Host "Message.$($cluster.Name)_UNREG: Empty response from $($cluster.Name)"
            continue
        }

        $registered = 0
        $unregistered = 0
        $partiallyRegistered = 0
        $unknown = 0

        # Safe iteration with array wrapper
        if ($result.CmNodes -and $result.CmNodes.item) {

            $nodes = @($result.CmNodes.item)

            foreach ($node in $nodes) {
                if ($node.CmDevices -and $node.CmDevices.item) {

                    $devices = @($node.CmDevices.item)

                    foreach ($dev in $devices) {
                        switch ($dev.Status) {
                            "Registered"          { $registered++ }
                            "UnRegistered"        { $unregistered++ }
                            "PartiallyRegistered" { $partiallyRegistered++ }
                            "Unknown"             { $unknown++ }
                            default               { $unknown++ }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        # Null safety
        if (-not $registered)          { $registered = 0 }
        if (-not $unregistered)        { $unregistered = 0 }
        if (-not $partiallyRegistered) { $partiallyRegistered = 0 }
        if (-not $unknown)             { $unknown = 0 }

        $total = $registered + $unregistered + $partiallyRegistered + $unknown

        # ---- OUTPUT FOR SAM ----
        Write-Host "Statistic.$($cluster.Name)_REG: $registered"
        Write-Host "Message.$($cluster.Name)_REG: $registered phones registered in $($cluster.Name)"
        Write-Host "Statistic.$($cluster.Name)_UNREG: $unregistered"
        Write-Host "Message.$($cluster.Name)_UNREG: $unregistered phones unregistered in $($cluster.Name)"
        Write-Host "Statistic.$($cluster.Name)_PARTIAL: $partiallyRegistered"

Phone without Desc:
# ======================== CUCM PHONES WITHOUT DESCRIPTION (FINAL STABLE) =============================#

# ---- LOAD CREDENTIALS ----
$SecurePath = "C:\YOUR_PATH\Secure"
$key = Get-Content "$SecurePath\aes.key"
$cucmPass = Get-Content "$SecurePath\cucm.cred" | ConvertTo-SecureString -Key $key
$Cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential ("SVCRTMT", $cucmPass)

# ---- CLUSTERS ----
$CucmClusters = @(
    @{ Name="APAC"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS"; Version="15.0" },
    @{ Name="EMEA"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS"; Version="15.0" },
    @{ Name="AMER"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS";  Version="15.0" }
)

# ---- SIMPLE SSL BYPASS (SAM SAFE) ----
[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = {$true}
[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [System.Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12

try {

    foreach ($cluster in $CucmClusters) {

        $soapBody = @"
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"
xmlns:ns="http://www.cisco.com/AXL/API/$($cluster.Version)">
<soapenv:Header/>
<soapenv:Body>
<ns:executeSQLQuery>
<sql>
SELECT COUNT(*) AS NoDescCount
FROM device d
JOIN typemodel tm ON d.tkmodel = tm.enum
JOIN typeclass tc ON tm.tkclass = tc.enum
WHERE tc.name = 'Phone'
AND (d.description IS NULL OR d.description = '')
</sql>
</ns:executeSQLQuery>
</soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>
"@

        $headers = @{
            "SOAPAction" = "CUCM:DB ver=$($cluster.Version) executeSQLQuery"
        }

        $resp = Invoke-RestMethod `
            -Uri "https://$($cluster.Server):8443/axl/" `
            -Method Post `
            -Credential $Cred `
            -ContentType "text/xml; charset=utf-8" `
            -Headers $headers `
            -Body $soapBody `
            -TimeoutSec 60

        # ---- SAFE INTEGER CAST ----
        $count = 0
        if ($resp.Envelope.Body.executeSQLQueryResponse.return.row.NoDescCount) {
            $count = [int]$resp.Envelope.Body.executeSQLQueryResponse.return.row.NoDescCount
        }

        if (-not $count) { $count = 0 }

        $label = "$($cluster.Name)_PHONES_NODESC"

        Write-Host "Statistic.$($label): $count"
        Write-Host "Message.$($label): $count phones without description in $($cluster.Name)"
    }

    exit 0
}
catch {
    Write-Host "Statistic.Error: 0"
    Write-Host "Message.Error: Phone no-description query failed"
    exit 0
}

    ConvertTo-SecureString -Key $key

$Cred      = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential ("SVCRTMT", $cucmPass)
$SolarCred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential ("YOUR_USERNAME", $solarPass)

# =====================================================

    @{ Name="APAC"; Server="YOUR_IP_ADDRESS"; Version="15.0" },

)

add-type @"
using System.Net;
using System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates;
public class TrustAllCertsPolicy : ICertificatePolicy {
    public bool CheckValidationResult(
        ServicePoint srvPoint,
        X509Certificate certificate,
        WebRequest request,
        int certificateProblem) {
        return true;
    }
}
"@
[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::CertificatePolicy = New-Object TrustAllCertsPolicy
[Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12

# =====================================================

$CUCMRows = @()

foreach ($cluster in $CucmClusters) {


    $soapBody = @"
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"
  xmlns:ns="http://www.cisco.com/AXL/API/$($cluster.Version)">
  <soapenv:Header/>
  <soapenv:Body>
    <ns:listGateway>
      <searchCriteria>
        <domainName>%</domainName>
      </searchCriteria>
      <returnedTags>
        <domainName/>
        <description/>
        <product/>
        <model/>
        <protocol/>
        <devicePoolName/>
        <locationName/>
      </returnedTags>
    </ns:listGateway>
  </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>
"@

    $headers = @{
        "SOAPAction" = "CUCM:DB ver=$($cluster.Version) listGateway"
    }

    try {

        $resp = Invoke-RestMethod `
            -Uri "https://$($cluster.Server):8443/axl/" `
            -Method Post `
            -Credential $Cred `
            -ContentType "text/xml; charset=utf-8" `
            -Headers $headers `
            -Body $soapBody `
            -TimeoutSec 60

        $gateways = $resp.Envelope.Body.listGatewayResponse.return.gateway

        foreach ($gw in $gateways) {

            # Extract IP from Description
            $ip = $null
            if ($gw.description -match '(\d{1,3}(\.\d{1,3}){3})') {
                $ip = $Matches[1]
            }

            $CUCMRows += [pscustomobject]@{
                Cluster     = $cluster.Name
                DeviceName  = $gw.domainName
                Model       = $gw.model
                Product     = $gw.product
                Description = $gw.description
                DevicePool  = $gw.devicePoolName
                Location    = $gw.locationName
                Protocol    = $gw.protocol
                GatewayIP   = $ip
            }
        }

            }
    catch {
           }
}

# =====================================================
# PART 2 — SOLARWINDS VOICE GATEWAYS
# =====================================================


$OrionServer = "YOUR_SERVER_HOSTNAME"

$swis = Connect-Swis -Hostname $OrionServer -Credential $SolarCred

"@

title: SW Decom - check-orion-node-prod
description: Function check-orion-node-prod from SW Decom
code:
function check-orion-node-prod ($caption)
{
    $orion_usr = "YOUR_USERNAME"
    $orion_pwd = "YOUR_PASSWORD"
    $orion_server_prod = "YOUR_SERVER_HOSTNAME"
    $swis_prod = Connect-Swis -Hostname $orion_server_prod -Username $orion_usr -Password $orion_pwd

    if (!($nodeId = Get-SwisData $swis_prod "SELECT NodeId FROM Orion.Nodes WHERE NodeName LIKE '$caption'"))
    {
        LogWrite "Node=$caption;Message=`"Not present in PROD Orion.`""
    }
    else
    {
        $node_details = Get-SwisData $swis_prod "SELECT n.Caption, n.uri, cp.Alert_Template, cp.Application_Code, cp.Application_Name, cp.CPU_Alert, cp.Custom_Monitoring, cp.DeviceType, cp.Entity_Type, cp.Environment, cp.Notes, cp.Patch_Group
        FROM Orion.NodesCustomProperties cp
        JOIN Orion.Nodes n ON cp.NodeID=n.NodeID
        WHERE n.Caption like '$caption'"

        $alert_template = $node_details.Alert_Template
        $app_code = $node_details.Application_Code
        $app_name = $node_details.Application_Name
        $cpu_alert = $node_details.CPU_Alert
        $custom = $node_details.Custom_Monitoring
        $device = $node_details.DeviceType
        $entity = $node_details.Entity_Type
        $env = $node_details.Environment
        $notes = $node_details.Notes
        $patch = $node_details.Patch_Group
        $global:uri_p = $node_details.uri
        LogWrite "Node=$Caption;Message=`"Will be deleted from PROD.`""
        LogWrite "alert_template=`"$alert_template`";app_code=`"$app_code`";app_name=`"$app_name`";cpu_alert=`"$cpu_alert`";custom_monitoring=`"$custom`";devicetype=`"$device`";Entity_Type=`"$entity`";Env=$env;Notes=`"$notes`";Patch=`"$patch`""

        return $uri_p
    }
}

    $orion_pwd = "YOUR_PASSWORD"
    $orion_server_test = "YOUR_SERVER_HOSTNAME"
    $swis_test = Connect-Swis -Hostname $orion_server_test -Username $orion_usr -Password $orion_pwd

    if (!($nodeId = Get-SwisData $swis_test "SELECT NodeId FROM Orion.Nodes WHERE NodeName LIKE '$caption'"))
    {
        LogWrite "Node=$caption;Message=`"Not present in TEST Orion.`""
    }
    else
    {
        $node_details = Get-SwisData $swis_test "SELECT n.Caption, n.uri, cp.Alert_Template, cp.Application_Code, cp.Application_Name, cp.CPU_Alert, cp.Custom_Monitoring, cp.DeviceType, cp.Entity_Type, cp.Environment, cp.Notes, cp.Patch_Group
        FROM Orion.NodesCustomProperties cp
        JOIN Orion.Nodes n ON cp.NodeID=n.NodeID
        WHERE n.Caption like '$caption'"

        $alert_template = $node_details.Alert_Template
        $app_code = $node_details.Application_Code
        $app_name = $node_details.Application_Name
        $cpu_alert = $node_details.CPU_Alert
        $custom = $node_details.Custom_Monitoring
        $device = $node_details.DeviceType
        $entity = $node_details.Entity_Type
        $env = $node_details.Environment
        $notes = $node_details.Notes
        $patch = $node_details.Patch_Group
        $global:uri_t = $node_details.uri
        LogWrite "Node=$Caption;Message=`"Will be deleted from TEST.`""
        LogWrite "alert_template=`"$alert_template`";app_code=`"$app_code`";app_name=`"$app_name`";cpu_alert=`"$cpu_alert`";custom_monitoring=`"$custom`";devicetype=`"$device`";Entity_Type=`"$entity`";Env=$env;Notes=`"$notes`";Patch=`"$patch`""

        return $uri_t
    }
}

title: SW Decom - delete-orion-node-prod
description: Function delete-orion-node-prod from SW Decom
code:
function delete-orion-node-prod ($caption,$uri_p)
{
    $orion_usr = "YOUR_USERNAME"
    $orion_pwd = "YOUR_PASSWORD"
    $orion_server_prod = "YOUR_SERVER_HOSTNAME"
    $swis_prod = Connect-Swis -Hostname $orion_server_prod -Username $orion_usr -Password $orion_pwd

    LogWrite "Node=$caption;Message=`"Removed from Orion PROD.`""

    Remove-SwisObject $swis_prod $uri_p
}
#endregion

$list = get-splunk-search-results

foreach($entry in $list)
{
    # Parse out the servername, Ivanti guid (this is used to close the request) and request number for logging
    $server = $entry.ServerName
    $guid = $entry.pm_guid
    $req = $entry.rm_id

    # Get date and write to log for Splunk indexing
    $get_date = (Get-Date).ToString('MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss')
    echo "$get_date`tNode=$server;GUID=$guid;Request=$req" | Out-File $tmp_LogfilePath -Append

    # Call functions to see if server is in Orion (Test and Prod)
    $node_uri_test = check-orion-node-test -caption $server
    $node_uri_prod = check-orion-node-prod -caption $server

    # If node is found in Test, delete it and close the request
    if($node_uri_test)
    {
        LogWrite "Node_Uri=$node_uri_test"

        delete-orion-node-test -caption $server -uri $uri_t
    }

    # If node is found in Production, delete it and close the request
    if($node_uri_prod)
    {
        LogWrite "Node_Uri=$node_uri_prod"

        delete-orion-node-prod -caption $server -uri $uri_p
    }

    # this text will appear in the closed request as the close description. Update this as needed. Second command changes the formatting so that it can be passed in the REST call.
    $close_text = "Server has been removed from Orion monitoring. Request was closed by automation script Decom_Server_in_Orion from YOUR_SERVER_HOSTNAME."
    $close_details = $close_text.Replace(" ","%20").Replace(".","%2E")

    $TK = @{

Authentication='fe819ad4-7f6d-40e8-9e46-7b5fd4e8a9b4'
}
    #$CS = Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri  http://YOUR_SERVER_HOSTNAME:9001/api/anonymous/DecomissionServer?guid=$guid"&"message=$close_details -Headers $TK     #TEST

    $CS = Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri  http://wpbsrapp02:9001/api/anonymous/DecomissionServer?guid=$guid"&"message=$close_details -Headers $TK      #PROD
    sleep -Seconds 2
    LogWrite "Return_Message=$CS"
    LogWrite "Request=$req;Message=`"Request:$req Closed!`""
    LogWrite "----------end $server---------"

    Clear-Variable node_uri_prod
    Clear-Variable node_uri_test
}

if($list -eq $null)
{
    LogWrite "No servers to process"
}

clean_up_logfile

title: Group
description: Automated SolarWinds group management and node assignment
code:
﻿$OrionServer = "XX"
$username = "YOUR_USERNAME"
$Password = YOUR_PASSWORD

$DatevalueToAppendLogName = (get-Date).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss")
$LogFileName = "Group_Creation"+$DatevalueToAppendLogName
$LogfilePath = "C:\YOUR_SCRIPTS_PATH\LogFolder\$LogFileName.log"
New-Item $LogfilePath -type file
Add-Content $LogfilePath "$DatevalueToAppendLogName Severity=Information; Class=Automation; Method=SWIS; Message=Groupcreation - Done";

$swis = Connect-Swis -Hostname $OrionServer -Username $Username -Password $Password

$query = "
SELECT Nodes.Caption
   FROM Orion.Nodes AS Nodes
WHERE Nodes.Caption like '%RTR'
"
$nodes = Get-SwisData -SwisConnection $swis -Query $query
foreach ($G in $nodes) {
     $Group = $G.Replace("RTR","")
     $groupId = (Invoke-SwisVerb $swis "Orion.Container" "CreateContainer" @(
       "$Group",
       "Core",
        60,
        0,
        "Group $Group created by the PowerShell script.",
        "true",
        ([xml]@(
       "<ArrayOfMemberDefinitionInfo xmlns='http://schemas.solarwinds.com/2008/Orion'>",
        "</ArrayOfMemberDefinitionInfo>"
    )).DocumentElement
  )).InnerText
$subgroupmembersWAN = @(
    @{ Name = "Subgroup WAN"; Definition = "filter:/Orion.Nodes[Caption='$G']" }
    )
    $WAN=$Group+"-WAN"
$subgroupIdWAN = (Invoke-SwisVerb $swis "Orion.Container" "CreateContainer" @(
        "$WAN",
        "Core",
         60,
         0,
        "Sub Group $WAN created by the PowerShell script.",
        "true",
        ([xml]@(
       "<ArrayOfMemberDefinitionInfo xmlns='http://schemas.solarwinds.com/2008/Orion'>",
       [string]($subgroupmembersWAN |% {
         "<MemberDefinitionInfo><Name>$($_.Name)</Name><Definition>$($_.Definition)</Definition></MemberDefinitionInfo>"
         }
       ),
       "</ArrayOfMemberDefinitionInfo>"
    )).DocumentElement
  )).InnerText
$subgroupmembersSW = @(
    @{ Name = "Caption contain $Group"; Definition = "filter:/Orion.Nodes[Contains(Caption,'$Group')]"},
    @{ Name = "Subgroup exclude WAN"; Definition = "filter:/Orion.Nodes[WanTechnology!='mpls']"}

    )
    $SW=$Group+"-SW"
$subgroupIdSW = (Invoke-SwisVerb $swis "Orion.Container" "CreateContainer" @(
        "$SW"
        "Core",
         60,
         0,
        "Sub Group $SW created by the PowerShell script.",
        "true",
        ([xml]@(
       "<ArrayOfMemberDefinitionInfo xmlns='http://schemas.solarwinds.com/2008/Orion'>",
       [string]($subgroupmembersSW |% {
         "<MemberDefinitionInfo><Name>$($_.Name)</Name><Definition>$($_.Definition)</Definition></MemberDefinitionInfo>"
         }
       ),
       "</ArrayOfMemberDefinitionInfo>"
    )).DocumentElement
  )).InnerText

  $subgroupWANUri = Get-SwisData $swis "SELECT Uri FROM Orion.Container WHERE ContainerID=@id" @{ id = $subgroupIdWAN }

Invoke-SwisVerb $swis "Orion.Container" "AddDefinition" @(
  $groupId,
  ([xml]"
    <MemberDefinitionInfo xmlns='http://schemas.solarwinds.com/2008/Orion'>
        <Name></Name>
        <Definition>$subgroupWANUri</Definition>
      </MemberDefinitionInfo>"
  ).DocumentElement
) | Out-Null
 $subgroupSWUri = Get-SwisData $swis "SELECT Uri FROM Orion.Container WHERE ContainerID=@id" @{ id = $subgroupIdSW }

Invoke-SwisVerb $swis "Orion.Container" "AddDefinition" @(
  $groupId,
  ([xml]"
    <MemberDefinitionInfo xmlns='http://schemas.solarwinds.com/2008/Orion'>
        <Name></Name>
        <Definition>$subgroupSWUri</Definition>
      </MemberDefinitionInfo>"
  ).DocumentElement
) | Out-Null

  Add-Content $LogfilePath "Group $Group SubGroup $WAN $SW Created"

    }

title: Heartbeat
description: SolarWinds heartbeat/polling status check script
code:
﻿#powershell -command "&C:\YOUR_SCRIPTS_PATH\ScriptFiles\Template.ps1 -strNodeName '${N=SwisEntity;M=Caption}' -strAlertName  '${N=Alerting;M=AlertName}' -strSeverity ' ' -strAlertID '${N=Alerting;M=AlertID}'"

#-------Dynamic Log File ------------------------#
$DatevalueToAppendLogName = (get-Date).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss")
$LogFileName = "TestHeartbeat"+$DatevalueToAppendLogName
$LogfilePath = "C:\YOUR_SCRIPTS_PATH\LogFolder\$LogFileName.log"
$tmp_LogfilePath = "C:\YOUR_SCRIPTS_PATH\LogFolder\Test_Temp_$LogFileName.log"

New-Item $tmp_LogfilePath -type file -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
New-Item $LogfilePath -type file
function LogWrite
{
   Param ([string]$logstring)
   $logstring | Out-File $tmp_LogfilePath -Append
}

function clean_up_logfile
{
    Move-Item -Path $tmp_LogfilePath -Destination $LogfilePath
}
#------------------------------------------------#
#--------- Credentials --------------------------------#
$headers = New-Object "System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary[[String],[String]]"
$headers.Add("Authorization", "XXX XXXX")
$headers.Add("Content-Type", "text/plain")
#-------------------Date and Time------------------------------------#
#----------- SPlunk URL -----------------------------#
$SPK = 'XXX/services/collector/raw'
#-------------------------------------------------#
$J='"severity": Critical,
"AlertName": Solarwinds_HeartBeat_Alert,
"HostName" : XXXX,
"AppCode" : XXX'
#---------- Call API To Target------------------------------#
add-type @"
    using System.Net;
    using System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates;
    public class TrustAllCertsPolicy : ICertificatePolicy {
        public bool CheckValidationResult(
            ServicePoint srvPoint, X509Certificate certificate,
            WebRequest request, int certificateProblem) {
            return true;
        }
    }
"@
[System.Net.ServicePointManager]::CertificatePolicy = New-Object TrustAllCertsPolicy

    # This will allow for self-signed SSL certs to work
    [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12
    [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = { $true }
$Rt = Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri $SPK  -Headers $headers -Body $J
#----------------------------------------------------#

#---------- Sent  History log -----------------------#
$EchoID =  $Rt.result.sys_id
if($EchoID){
LogWrite "Successfully sent and echo ID is : $EchoID"
}
Else{
LogWrite "Alert not sent as echo did not recieve from Target"
}

clean_up_logfile
#-----------------------------------------------------#

title: Download Config NCM
description: Network Configuration Manager automation and config change tracking
code:
# ===================== CONFIG =====================
$SecurePath = "C:\YOUR_PATH\Secure"
$SwServer   = "YOUR_SERVER_HOSTNAME"
$TargetIP   = "YOUR_IP_ADDRESS"
$ConfigType = "Running"   # Running / Startup / RunningAndStartup

# ===================== LOAD ENCRYPTED CREDS =====================
$key = Get-Content "$SecurePath\aes.key"
$solarPass = Get-Content "$SecurePath\solarwinds.cred" |
    ConvertTo-SecureString -Key $key
$SolarCred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential ("YOUR_USERNAME", $solarPass)

Import-Module SwisPowerShell

Write-Host "Connecting to SolarWinds..." -ForegroundColor Cyan
$swis = Connect-Swis -Hostname $SwServer -Credential $SolarCred
if (!$swis) { Write-Host "Failed to connect." -ForegroundColor Red; exit }
Write-Host "Connected successfully." -ForegroundColor Green

# ===================== GET NCM NODE =====================
$ncmNode = Get-SwisData $swis @"
SELECT NodeID, NodeCaption
FROM Cirrus.Nodes
WHERE AgentIP = @ip
"@ @{ ip = $TargetIP }

if (!$ncmNode) {
    Write-Host "No NCM node found for IP $TargetIP" -ForegroundColor Yellow
    exit
}

$nodeGuid    = [System.Guid]::Parse($ncmNode.NodeID.ToString())
$nodeCaption = $ncmNode.NodeCaption
Write-Host "Node      : $nodeCaption" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "Node GUID : $nodeGuid"    -ForegroundColor Green

# ===================== TRIGGER DOWNLOAD =====================
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Triggering $ConfigType config download..." -ForegroundColor Cyan

$nodeList = New-Object System.Collections.ArrayList
[void]$nodeList.Add($nodeGuid)

$result     = Invoke-SwisVerb $swis "Cirrus.ConfigArchive" "DownloadConfig" @($nodeList, $ConfigType) -ErrorAction Stop
$transferID = $result.InnerText

Write-Host "Transfer queued. TransferID: $transferID" -ForegroundColor Green

# ===================== POLL TRANSFER STATUS =====================
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Polling transfer status (max 60s)..." -ForegroundColor Cyan

$maxWait   = 60
$elapsed   = 0
$pollEvery = 5

do {
    Start-Sleep $pollEvery
    $elapsed += $pollEvery

    $status = Get-SwisData $swis @"
SELECT TransferID, Status, ErrorMessage, ConfigID, DateTime, UserName
FROM NCM.TransferResults
WHERE TransferID = @tid
"@ @{ tid = $transferID }

    if ($status) {
        $statusText = switch ($status.Status) {
            0 { "Queued" }
            1 { "Transferring" }
            2 { "Complete" }
            3 { "Error" }
            default { "Unknown ($($status.Status))" }
        }
        $color = switch ($status.Status) {
            2 { "Green" }
            3 { "Red" }
            default { "Yellow" }
        }

        Write-Host "[$elapsed`s] $statusText" -ForegroundColor $color

        if ($status.Status -eq 3) {
            Write-Host "Error: $($status.ErrorMessage)" -ForegroundColor Red
            break
        }
        if ($status.Status -eq 2) {
            Write-Host ""
            Write-Host "Config downloaded successfully!" -ForegroundColor Green
            Write-Host "ConfigID  : $($status.ConfigID)"  -ForegroundColor Green
            Write-Host "Requested : $($status.DateTime)"  -ForegroundColor Green
            Write-Host "By User   : $($status.UserName)"  -ForegroundColor Green
            break
        }
    } else {
        Write-Host "[$elapsed`s] Waiting for result..." -ForegroundColor Gray
    }

} while ($elapsed -lt $maxWait)

if ($elapsed -ge $maxWait) {
    Write-Host "Timed out. Check NCM.TransferResults manually for TransferID: $transferID" -ForegroundColor Yellow
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Script Completed." -ForegroundColor Green


Result:

title: NCM Diff
description: Network Configuration Manager automation and config change tracking
code:
# ===================== CONFIG =====================
$SecurePath = "C:\YOUR_PATH\Secure"
$SwServer   = "YOUR_SERVER_HOSTNAME"
$TargetIP   = "YOUR_IP_ADDRESS"   # Set to "" for ALL nodes with changes
$HoursBack  = 24
$OutputDir  = "C:\YOUR_PATH\ConfigDiffs"

# ===================== LOAD ENCRYPTED CREDS =====================
$key = Get-Content "$SecurePath\aes.key"
$solarPass = Get-Content "$SecurePath\solarwinds.cred" |
    ConvertTo-SecureString -Key $key
$SolarCred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential ("YOUR_USERNAME", $solarPass)

Import-Module SwisPowerShell

Write-Host "Connecting to SolarWinds..." -ForegroundColor Cyan
$swis = Connect-Swis -Hostname $SwServer -Credential $SolarCred
if (!$swis) { Write-Host "Failed to connect." -ForegroundColor Red; exit }
Write-Host "Connected successfully." -ForegroundColor Green

# ===================== CREATE OUTPUT DIR =====================
if (!(Test-Path $OutputDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $OutputDir | Out-Null }

# ===================== QUERY CHANGED CONFIGS =====================
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Querying configs changed in last $HoursBack hours..." -ForegroundColor Cyan

$ipFilter = if ($TargetIP -ne "") { "AND NNodes.AgentIP = '$TargetIP'" } else { "" }

$query = @"
SELECT
    NNodes.NodeCaption,
    NNodes.AgentIP,
    NNodes.NodeID                AS NCMNodeID,
    ConfigArchive.ConfigID,
    ConfigArchive.ConfigTitle,
    ConfigArchive.DownloadTime,
    ConfigArchive.ConfigType,
    DiffResults.DiffFlag,
    DiffResults.DiffList,
    DiffResults.ConfigTitleBefore,
    DiffResults.ConfigTypeBefore,
    DiffResults.ComparisonType
FROM NCM.Nodes AS NNodes
INNER JOIN NCM.ConfigArchive AS ConfigArchive ON NNodes.NodeId = ConfigArchive.NodeId
INNER JOIN Cirrus.CacheDiffResults AS DiffResults ON ConfigArchive.ConfigID = DiffResults.ConfigID
WHERE ConfigArchive.DownloadTime >= ADDHOUR(-$HoursBack, GETDATE())
  AND DiffResults.ComparisonType = 4
  AND DiffResults.DiffFlag = 1
  $ipFilter
ORDER BY NNodes.NodeCaption, ConfigArchive.DownloadTime DESC
"@

$results = Get-SwisData $swis $query

if (!$results) {
    Write-Host "No config changes found in the last $HoursBack hours." -ForegroundColor Yellow
    exit
}

Write-Host "Found $($results.Count) changed config(s)." -ForegroundColor Green

# ===================== EXPORT DIFFS =====================
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Exporting diffs to $OutputDir ..." -ForegroundColor Cyan

$timestamp = Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"
$summary   = @()

foreach ($r in $results) {
    $safeName  = $r.NodeCaption -replace '[\\/:*?"<>|]', '_'
    $safeType  = $r.ConfigType  -replace '[\\/:*?"<>|]', '_'
    $safeTime  = ([datetime]$r.DownloadTime).ToString("yyyyMMdd_HHmmss")
    $fileName  = "${safeName}_${safeType}_${safeTime}.diff.txt"
    $filePath  = Join-Path $OutputDir $fileName

    $header = @"
Node           : $($r.NodeCaption)
IP             : $($r.AgentIP)
Config Type    : $($r.ConfigType)
Config Title   : $($r.ConfigTitle)
Previous Title : $($r.ConfigTitleBefore)
Download Time  : $($r.DownloadTime)
ConfigID       : $($r.ConfigID)
Report URL     : https://$SwServer/Orion/NCM/ConfigChangeReport.aspx?ConfigID=$($r.ConfigID)&ComparisonType=4&NodeID=$($r.NCMNodeID)
$('=' * 80)

"@
    $header + $r.DiffList | Out-File -FilePath $filePath -Encoding UTF8

    Write-Host "  Saved: $fileName" -ForegroundColor Green

    $summary += [PSCustomObject]@{
        Node          = $r.NodeCaption
        IP            = $r.AgentIP
        ConfigType    = $r.ConfigType
        PreviousTitle = $r.ConfigTitleBefore
        CurrentTitle  = $r.ConfigTitle
        DownloadTime  = $r.DownloadTime
        ConfigID      = $r.ConfigID
        ReportURL     = "https://$SwServer/Orion/NCM/ConfigChangeReport.aspx?ConfigID=$($r.ConfigID)&ComparisonType=4&NodeID=$($r.NCMNodeID)"
        DiffFile      = $fileName
    }
}

# ===================== SUMMARY REPORT =====================
$summaryFile = Join-Path $OutputDir "Summary_$timestamp.csv"
$summary | Export-Csv -Path $summaryFile -NoTypeInformation -Encoding UTF8

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "===== SUMMARY =====" -ForegroundColor Cyan
$summary | Format-Table Node, IP, ConfigType, DownloadTime, DiffFile -AutoSize

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "CSV summary : $summaryFile" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "Diff files  : $OutputDir"   -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "Script Completed."           -ForegroundColor Green

title: Migration - ICMP & SNMP Migration
description: SolarWinds server migration - node and settings transfer
code:
##--------------ICMP & SNMP Migration----------------------------------------##
foreach ($sourceNode in $SNMPType) {
    # See if there is already a node on the target with the same IP address
    $targetNodeUri = Get-SwisData $target "SELECT Uri FROM Orion.Nodes WHERE IPAddress=@ip" @{ip=$sourceNode.IPAddress}

    if ($targetNodeUri -ne $null) {
        Add-Content $LogfilePath "Skipping" $sourceNode.Caption "(" $sourceNode.IPAddress ") because it is already managed by " $hostname2
        continue
    }

    # Fetch all properties of the source node
    $sourceNodeProps = Get-SwisData $source "SELECT  Caption, Uri,Community, Contact, DNS, DynamicIP, External, EntityType, GroupStatus, IOSImage, IOSVersion, IPAddress, IPAddressGUID,
        IPAddressType, LastSystemUpTimePollUtc, Location, MachineType, NodeDescription, ObjectSubType, PollInterval, RediscoveryInterval, Severity, SNMPVersion,
        StatCollection, Status, StatusDescription, StatusLED, SysName, SysObjectID, TotalMemory, Vendor, VendorIcon, RWCommunity,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.Username AS SNMPV3Username, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.Context AS SNMPV3Context,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.PrivacyMethod AS SNMPV3PrivMethod, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.PrivacyKey AS SNMPV3PrivKey,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.PrivacyKeyIsPassword AS SNMPV3PrivKeyIsPwd, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.AuthenticationMethod AS SNMPV3AuthMethod,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.AuthenticationKey AS SNMPV3AuthKey, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.AuthenticationKeyIsPassword AS SNMPV3AuthKeyIsPwd,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWUsername AS RWSNMPV3Username, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWContext AS RWSNMPV3Context,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWPrivacyMethod AS RWSNMPV3PrivMethod, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWPrivacyKey AS RWSNMPV3PrivKey,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWPrivacyKeyIsPassword AS RWSNMPV3PrivKeyIsPwd, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWAuthenticationMethod AS RWSNMPV3AuthMethod,
        Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWAuthenticationKey AS RWSNMPV3AuthKey, Nodes.SNMPv3Credentials.RWAuthenticationKeyIsPassword AS RWSNMPV3AuthKeyIsPwd
        From Orion.Nodes Where NodeID = @nodeid" @{nodeid=$sourceNode.Nodeid}

##--------------------------------InternalDebuglog----------------------------------------------##
$DatevalueToAppendLogName = (get-Date).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss")
$LogFileName = "Migration_Orion_Nodes"+$DatevalueToAppendLogName
$LogfilePath = "C:\YOUR_SCRIPTS_PATH\LogFolder\$LogFileName.log"
New-Item $LogfilePath -type file
Add-Content $LogfilePath "--------------------------$LogFileName ----------------------------"
#--------------------------------Credentials----------------------------------------------------##
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$CopyVolumes = $true
$CopyInterfaces = $true
$hostname1 = "XXX";
$username1 = "XXX"
$hostname2 = "XXX";
$password2 = "XXX"
$username2 = "XXX"
Import-Module SwisPowerShell
#--------------------------- Connect to the source system----------------------------------------###
$source = Connect-Swis -Hostname $hostname1 -Username $username1 -Password $password1
# ---------------------------------Connect to the target system----------------------------------##
$target = Connect-Swis -Hostname $hostname2 -Username $username2 -Password $password2

# Get the complete list of Nodes from the source system
$sourceNodes = Get-SwisData $source "SELECT d.Uri, d.IPAddress, d.ObjectSubType,d.Caption, d.NodeID FROM Orion.Nodes as d where [d].CustomProperties.Environment not in ('DR','Pre-Prod','Production')"
#---------Node going to migrate ------------------##
$WMIType=$sourceNodes | where {$_.ObjectSubType -eq 'WMI'}
$SNMPType=$sourceNodes | where {$_.ObjectSubType -eq 'SNMP'}
Add-Content $LogfilePath "$sourceNodes"

title: CreateAppInsightForSQL
description: AppInsight template setup for automated application monitoring
code:
Import-Module SwisPowerShell

$appSettings = @{};
#$appSettings.Add('InstanceName', ''); #instance name is not required, if not specified than default instance name will be used
$appSettings.Add('PortType', 'static');  #default or static, when static than PortNumber needs to be set
$appSettings.Add('PortNumber', '1433');

$hostname = "YOUR_IP_ADDRESS"
$username = "YOUR_USERNAME"
$plainTextPassword = YOUR_PASSWORD
$password = YOUR_PASSWORD | ConvertTo-SecureString -AsPlainText -Force

$cred = New-Object -typename System.Management.Automation.PSCredential -argumentlist $username, $password
$swis = Connect-Swis -host $hostname -cred $cred

$nodeId = 2
$credentialSetId = -3 #-3 means take it from node

$template = "AppInsight for SQL"
$applicationTemplateId = Get-SwisData $swis "SELECT ApplicationTemplateID FROM Orion.APM.ApplicationTemplate WHERE Name=@template" @{ template = $template }

if (!$applicationTemplateId) {
	Write-Host "Can't find template with name '$template'."
	exit 1
}

Write-Host "Creating application on node '$nodeId' using template '$applicationTemplateId' and credential '$credentialSetId'."

$applicationId = (Invoke-SwisVerb $swis "Orion.APM.Application" "CreateApplication" @(
    $nodeId,
    $applicationTemplateId,
    $credentialSetId,
    "true",
	$appSettings
)).InnerText

# Check if the application was created
if ($applicationId -eq -1) {
	Write-Host "Application wasn't created. Likely the template is already assigned to node and the skipping of duplications are set to 'true'."
	exit 1
}
else {
	Write-Host "Application created with ID '$applicationId'."
}

title: SAM.Application (Part 1/2)
description: SAM / APM - powershell script/query (Part 1 of 2)
code:
# This sample script demonstrates the use of verbs provided for manipulating
# applications and templates. The verbs are defined by "Orion.APM.Application"
# and "Orion.APM.ApplicationTemplate" entity types.
#
# The script progresses in several steps:
# 1. Creating a new application by assigning a template to a node.
# 2. Executing "Poll Now" on an application
# 3. Unmanage an application
# 4. Remanage an application
# 5. Deleting an application
# 6. Deleting an application template (commented out from the script execution)
#
# Please update the hostname and credential setup to match your configuration.

# Load SwisPowerShell
Import-Module SwisPowerShell

# Connect to SWIS
$hostname = "localhost"
$username = "YOUR_USERNAME"
$password = YOUR_PASSWORD System.Security.SecureString
$cred = New-Object -typename System.Management.Automation.PSCredential -argumentlist $username, $password
$swis = Connect-Swis -host $hostname -cred $cred

#
# ASSIGNING TEMPLATE TO A NODE
#
# Select the node, application template, and credential set, and create the application by the assigning template to node
# with the selected credential set.
#

# Select the node
$ip = "YOUR_IP_ADDRESS"
$nodeId = Get-SwisData $swis "SELECT NodeID FROM Orion.Nodes WHERE IP_Address=@ip" @{ ip = $ip }

if (!$nodeId) {
	Write-Host "Can't find node with IP '$ip'."
	exit 1
}

# Select the template
$template = "Apache"
$applicationTemplateId = Get-SwisData $swis "SELECT ApplicationTemplateID FROM Orion.APM.ApplicationTemplate WHERE Name=@template" @{ template = $template }

if (!$applicationTemplateId) {
	Write-Host "Can't find template with name '$template'."
	exit 1
}

# Select the credential
$credential = "MyCredential"
$credentialSetId = Get-SwisData $swis "SELECT ID FROM Orion.Credential WHERE CredentialOwner='APM' AND Name=@credential" @{ credential = $credential }

if (!$credentialSetId) {
	Write-Host "Can't find credential with name '$credential'."
	exit 1
}

# Credentials from the SAM credential library are expected to have credentialSetId > 0.
# But the "CreateApplication" method accepts the following special IDs for credentials:
#
# <None>
#    $credentialSetId = 0
#
# <Inherit Windows credential from node> (should be used only for WMI nodes)
#    $credentialSetId = -3
#
# <Inherit credentials from template>
#    $credentialSetId = -4

Write-Host "Creating application on node '$nodeId' using template '$applicationTemplateId' and credential '$credentialSetId'."

# Assign the application template to a node to create the application
$applicationId = (Invoke-SwisVerb $swis "Orion.APM.Application" "CreateApplication" @(
    # Node ID
    $nodeId,

	# Application Template ID
    $applicationTemplateId,

	# Credential Set ID
    $credentialSetId,

	# Skip if duplicate (in lowercase)
    "false"
)).InnerText

# Check if the application was created
if ($applicationId -eq -1) {
	Write-Host "Application wasn't created. Likely the template is already assigned to node and the skipping of duplications are set to 'true'."
	exit 1
}
else {
	Write-Host "Application created with ID '$applicationId'."
}

#
# EXECUTING "POLL NOW"
#
# Execute "Poll Now" on created application.
#
Write-Host "Executing Poll Now for application '$applicationId'."
Invoke-SwisVerb $swis "Orion.APM.Application" "PollNow" @($applicationId) | Out-Null
Write-Host "Poll Now for application '$applicationId' was executed."

#
# UNMANAGING APPLICATION
#
# Unmanaging created application.
#
Write-Host "Unmanaging application '$applicationId'."

$applicationNetObjectId = "AA:$applicationId"
$unmanageTime = Get-Date
$remanageTimeRelative = Get-Date -Date "1970-01-01 00:04:00"

Invoke-SwisVerb $swis "Orion.APM.Application" "Unmanage" @(
    # NetObjectID - for application has format "AA:<ApplicationID>"
	$applicationNetObjectId,

	# Unmanage time
	$unmanageTime,

	# Remanage time
	$remanageTimeRelative,

	# If the remanage time is relative (in lowercase). If "true" then the time of the day (hours, minutes and second)
	# is used for the calculation of remanage time.
	"true"
) | Out-Null

Write-Host "Application '$applicationId' is unmanaged."

#
# REMANAGING APPLICATION
#
# Remanaging created application.
#
Write-Host "Remanaging application '$applicationId'."
Invoke-SwisVerb $swis "Orion.APM.Application" "Remanage" @($applicationNetObjectId) | Out-Null
